Who We Are

A purpose-driven cocoa trading company rooted in Liberia.

ETTA Trading Corporation is a Liberian agro-based social enterprise founded by young entrepreneurs committed to transforming the cocoa sector. We stand between local cocoa production and serious market opportunity, building trust on both sides.

Our work is direct, practical, and farmer-first: purchase from communities, handle with discipline, supply to buyers who value responsible origin.

Learn More About ETTA
ETTA at work with farming communities across Liberia

Our Position

Empowering farmers and cultivating quality is more than our tagline. It is our operating standard.

ETTA exists to make cocoa trade more direct, more transparent, and more valuable for everyone in the chain.

Mission

Empower Farmers

To empower cocoa farmers in Liberia through fair trade, sustainable practices, and access to reliable markets.

Vision

Recognized Supply Chain

To build a recognized Liberian cocoa supply chain known for quality, transparency, and responsible trade.

Motto

Connecting Farmers to Opportunity

Every decision we make is guided by this single, practical commitment.

How ETTA Works

From Liberian farm relationships to buyer-ready cocoa supply.

1

Direct Sourcing

We purchase cocoa directly from farmers and farming communities, creating a clearer and fairer path from producer to market.

2

Quality Handling

Cocoa is sorted, handled, and prepared with quality expectations in mind before any buyer engagement takes place.

3

Buyer Supply

We connect available Liberian cocoa supply to buyers seeking reliable, transparent, and responsible sourcing partnerships.

Our Services

Practical cocoa trade support for farmers and buyers.

ETTA is built for practical trade execution: source, handle, verify, connect, and support responsible cocoa movement from Liberia to serious market opportunities.

  • Cocoa sourcing and aggregation from farming communities
  • Quality control, sorting, grading, and handling
  • Traceability and origin clarity documentation
  • Buyer partnership development and supply support

About ETTA

About ETTA Trading Corporation

A Liberian cocoa trading company preparing responsible, origin-led supply for serious markets.

Who We Are

A purpose-driven cocoa trading company.

ETTA Trading Corporation is a Liberian agro-based social enterprise established by young entrepreneurs with a shared vision: to transform Liberia's cocoa sector. We are not a middleman operation with no accountability. We are a direct trade company with farmer relationships at the center.

Our focus is practical: empower farmers, cultivate quality, and connect Liberian cocoa to reliable regional and global markets that respect responsible sourcing.

The ETTA team working alongside partner communities
Liberian cocoa supply starts at the farm.

What We Do

We help move Liberian cocoa from farm to market.

We work directly with smallholder farmers to source cocoa beans, support fair trade, strengthen supply chain efficiency, and prepare buyer-ready partnership opportunities. This means being present in the field, building lasting farmer relationships, and delivering supply that buyers can trust.

  • Direct farmer purchasing and relationship management
  • Cocoa aggregation from rural farming communities
  • Buyer-aligned quality handling and preparation
  • Transparent documentation and traceability support

Our Commitment

What buyers, farmers, and partners can count on.

Ethical Sourcing

Farmer-first relationships

We prioritize fair, transparent purchasing relationships with the farmers and communities we work with. No exploitation. No shortcuts.

Operational Clarity

Clear communication

We support clear documentation, communication, and accountability around supply, quality, and expectations at every step.

Farmer-First Growth

Stronger supply from stronger farmers

We believe stronger farmers create stronger cocoa trade. The development of farming capacity is not charity. It is sound business strategy.

Our Purpose

Mission, Vision & Values

The principles that guide our work across farmers, buyers, and communities.

Mission

Empowering Farmers

To empower cocoa farmers in Liberia through fair trade, sustainable practices, and improved access to reliable markets that provide real value for their work.

Vision

A Recognized Supply Chain

To build a globally recognized cocoa supply chain rooted in quality, transparency, and sustainability, with Liberian farmers at the foundation.

Motto

Connecting Farmers to Opportunity

This guides every procurement decision, every buyer conversation, and every operation we run.

Core Values

The standards behind the work.

🌱

Sustainability

Responsible farming and long-term resource care for generations beyond this one.

⚖️

Fair Trade

Fair value for farmers and responsible conduct across all trade relationships.

🤝

Community

Growth that supports rural livelihoods and local development beyond the cocoa market.

🔍

Transparency

Trust built through clearer sourcing, documentation, and honest communication.

🏆

Excellence

High standards in sourcing, quality, operations, and buyer engagement at every stage.

Built With Purpose

Our values are visible in the field, not just on paper.

ETTA's purpose drives every procurement, every handling decision, and every buyer conversation. If that aligns with what you are looking for in a cocoa partner, let's talk.

Start a Conversation

Our Services

How We Create Value

Practical cocoa trade services for farmers, buyers, and responsible partners.

Service 01

Direct Sourcing

We work directly with farmers and farming communities to purchase cocoa beans, improve trust, and build more transparent market relationships. Direct sourcing means fewer intermediaries, more clarity, and a better deal for the people growing the cocoa.

  • Direct farmer relationships in cocoa-producing communities
  • Fair purchasing conversations and clear expectations
  • Transparent value chain support from farm to delivery

Service 02

Quality Control & Handling

We support cocoa quality through careful handling, sorting, grading, and buyer-readiness preparation. Quality control is not an afterthought. It is built into the sourcing process from the point of purchase.

  • Bean sorting and grading support aligned to buyer standards
  • Quality-focused handling from farm collection to aggregation
  • Market-readiness preparation before buyer engagement

Service 03

Traceability

We provide clearer visibility into where cocoa is sourced, how it is handled, and how quality is maintained from origin to delivery. In a market that increasingly demands accountability, traceability is a buyer's most important assurance.

  • Product origin clarity and farmer source documentation
  • Ethical sourcing support and responsible trade alignment
  • Quality assurance communication for buyer confidence

Service 04

Buyer Supply & Partnership

We welcome responsible buyers, organizations, and stakeholders seeking reliable Liberian cocoa partnerships. ETTA can serve as your on-ground sourcing partner, supply coordinator, or market development ally in Liberia.

  • Buyer inquiry support and supply discussion facilitation
  • Partnership readiness for regional and global trade
  • Responsible trade alignment and supply chain transparency

Ready to Source

ETTA is prepared to engage serious cocoa buyers.

Whether you are sourcing for the first time from Liberia or looking to establish a consistent supply relationship, ETTA can work with you. Reach out with your requirements and let's see what's possible.

Send a Buyer Inquiry
Liberian cocoa, grown and sourced with care.

Our Impact

Building a Better Cocoa System

Our work supports farmers, communities, and responsible cocoa trade across Liberia.

Farmer Impact

Empowering the people who grow the cocoa.

ETTA helps farmers gain stronger market access, receive fairer trade opportunities, and build more stable livelihoods. When farmers do better, the cocoa supply chain becomes more reliable for everyone upstream.

Community Impact

Supporting the communities behind the harvest.

Better cocoa trade contributes to rural economic activity, job creation, and improved living conditions in farming communities. ETTA's work extends beyond a single transaction.

Responsible Trade

Promoting trade that leaves something behind.

ETTA is committed to ethical sourcing, sustainable agriculture, and long-term industry development. Responsible trade is not a premium feature. It is the baseline we work from.

ETTA with farming communities during an engagement session

The ETTA Team in Action

A team that shows up in the field.

Impact requires presence. ETTA's team is visible in farming communities, engaged with farmers directly, and committed to the work behind the supply chain.
